sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 13:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 13:1
items.html: When there is a corrected screen in the Partzuf at a suitable measure of coarseness that is fit for a coupling and to draw the upper light, the Partzuf is regarded as having a preparation to receive the upper light. (Inner Light, Item 6, Sub Header, “Preparation”)
